mapper.select: SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(child_job_id) FROM job_derivation WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} AND child_job_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS jobId, BIN_TO_UUID(root_job_id) AS rootJobId, recursion_depth AS recursionDepth, agent_profile_id AS agentProfileId, BIN_TO_UUID(conversation_id) AS conversationId, BIN_TO_UUID(source_message_id) AS sourceMessageId, COALESCE( JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(policy_json, '$.providerId')), 'fake' ) AS providerId, status FROM job WHERE id = #{parentJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job WHERE parent_job_id = #{parentJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job WHERE root_job_id = #{rootJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_derivation ( id, parent_job_id, child_job_id, origin_task_run_id, origin_loop_node_id, idempotency_key, source_skill_id, source_skill_version, status, request_json ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{parentJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{childJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{originTaskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{originLoopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{sourceSkillId}, #{sourceSkillVersion}, 'RUNNING', CAST(#{requestJson} AS JSON) )
mapper.update: UPDATE loop_node SET active_child_job_id = #{childJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{originLoopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'WAITING_CHILD_JOB' AND active_child_job_id IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(derivation.id) AS derivationId, BIN_TO_UUID(derivation.parent_job_id) AS parentJobId, BIN_TO_UUID(derivation.child_job_id) AS childJobId, BIN_TO_UUID(derivation.origin_task_run_id) AS originTaskRunId, BIN_TO_UUID(derivation.origin_loop_node_id) AS originLoopNodeId, derivation.status AS derivationStatus, child_job.status AS childJobStatus FROM job_derivation derivation JOIN job child_job ON child_job.id = derivation.child_job_id WHERE derivation.child_job_id = #{childJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} FOR UPDATE

SELECT COALESCE( GROUP_CONCAT( latest_run.result_summary ORDER BY task.sequence_no SEPARATOR '\n' ), 'Child Job 已完成' ) FROM task LEFT JOIN task_run latest_run ON latest_run.id = ( SELECT candidate.id FROM task_run candidate WHERE candidate.task_id = task.id AND candidate.status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY candidate.attempt_no DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE task.job_id = #{childJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evidence JOIN task ON task.id = evidence.task_id WHERE task.job_id = #{childJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
mapper.update: UPDATE job_derivation SET status = 'COMPLETED', outcome_json = CAST(#{outcomeJson} AS JSON), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE child_job_id = #{childJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE loop_node SET active_child_job_id = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{originLoopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND active_child_job_id = #{childJobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
